title: US will blockade Strait of Hormuz, Trump says
shortDescription: President Trump said the United States will seek control of the Strait of Hormuz and operate the waterway as tension between the U.S. and Iran grows.

title: Trump orders flags to fly at half-staff. Here's what it's for
shortDescription: President Donald Trump ordered flags to fly at half-staff after the death of Sen. Lindsey Graham, whom he called "a dear friend of mine."

title: Trump to host racers ahead of F250 Grand Prix. When is DC street race?
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is scheduled to host Álex Palou and other IndyCar officials on July 13. It comes before the Freedom 250 Grand Prix in August.

title: Daily Briefing: The Senate's empty seat
shortDescription: The chamber convenes for the first time since Sen. Lindsey Graham's death. Here is the news to know on Monday.

title: Congress has its eyes on a controversial federal agency
shortDescription: The Federal Emergency Management Agency aims to be a beacon of hope for people facing disaster. But the agency has faced 18 months of turmoil.

title: How Trump is using the federal government to gain control over elections
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is working to gain more control of the 2026 U.S. elections through a series of unprecedented moves to intervene in states.

title: Trump says Graham seemed tired but not ill in phone call before death
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said he spoke to Lindsey Graham by phone shortly before his death recounting that the senator seemed tired but fine otherwise.

title: Senate returns after Lindsey Graham's death: What to expect
shortDescription: The Senate returns July 13 for its first session since Sen. Lindsey Graham's death, with tributes, memorial traditions and leadership questions ahead.

title: Lindsey Graham's death leaves open one of the Senate's most powerful jobs
shortDescription: In the year and a half before he died, the South Carolina Republican led a Senate committee that was largely responsible for Trump's biggest wins.

title: Lindsey Graham was booked for TV Sunday. Then shock hit Congress
shortDescription: Lawmakers were stunned to learn of Graham's sudden passing. He was scheduled for a TV appearance on NBC's "Meet the Press."

title: Lindsey Graham, a staunch Trump ally and longtime GOP fixture, dies
shortDescription: The news of the unexpected death sent shockwaves through Capitol Hill and added uncertainty to an already chaotic political year.

title: Why Trump's popularity is falling among White working-class voters
shortDescription: Polling shows declining support for President Donald Trump among his white working-class base, but will it hurt Republicans in the midterms?

title: NYT says Trump admin subpoenas journalists over Air Force One reports
shortDescription: The media organization said subpoenas were issued July 10 asking that the journalists appear before a grand jury.

title: Former Overstock CEO ordered to pay Hunter Biden $1.7M damages
shortDescription: Hunter Biden was awarded $1.7 million in damages after a judge ruled former Overstock CEO Patrick Byrne defamed him with false Iran bribery claims.
